description: Maps spec versions to implementation status, computes spec freshness, and flags unimplemented spec changes. Generated for SD-09.

ratings_scale.aging: 60-79% — some spec changes not yet reflected

freshness.explanation: Implementation targets v0.17.1-alpha but spec is at v0.23.1-alpha. Multiple major versions behind with unimplemented changes in fleet, brain, and operations areas.

changes_implemented: Version consolidation format adopted
Enforcement vs monitoring distinction (Part 3) — fully implemented in hooks
Standing orders classified by mechanism
changes_not_implemented: CI version propagation to 4 display locations

changes_implemented: Hook enforcement coverage improved (8/15 SOs have hooks)
Hook test suite created
changes_not_implemented: Fleet maturity language changes (no fleet runtime)

changes_implemented: SPC-based anomaly detection in runaway detector
Control plane MVP (HTTP server, event ingestion, dashboard)
24 passing control plane tests
changes_not_implemented: Event-driven Brain operations with SPC health metrics

changes_implemented: Brain context router hook (brain consultation integration)
Token budget gate converted to advisory checkpoint
Hook deadlock elimination
changes_not_implemented: Context source routing logic (long context vs RAG vs escalate) — partial

changes_implemented: QUICKSTART gap closure
All 14 spec-gaps resolved with concrete thresholds
Reference constants registry mirrors spec-gap thresholds
Unified Trust Model with promotion/demotion thresholds
Reference constants registry created
Progressive adoption model defined in spec
changes_not_implemented: Part 12 Data Ecosystem — partially implemented (events/traces yes, analytics no)

changes_implemented: Fleet Control Plane progressive profiles defined
Control plane TypeScript reference with XSS fixes
changes_not_implemented: Multi-profile Control Plane UI (only CP1 CLI dashboard exists)

changes_implemented: Brain B1 file-based level implemented
4 hook manifests created
Agent definition schema created
8 hook implementations (of 8 manifests)
Brain B1 tools (query, record, retrieve, audit)
Session state management
changes_not_implemented: 71 core + 34 extended agent definitions (schemas only, no runtime)

drift_flags.description: 71 agent roles defined since v0.2.0; no fleet orchestration runtime exists. Blocks multi-agent coordination.
Vector store (B2) and HNSW index (B3) specified since v0.3.0; only B1 file-based implemented.
5 progressive CP profiles defined since v0.4.0; only CP1 CLI dashboard exists.
Automated review, test generation, coverage tracking specified; only SPC anomaly detection implemented.
Multi-platform adapter pattern specified; only Claude Code adapter exists.
MCP protocol integration specified as optional; not yet implemented.
Enrichment pipeline and analytics layer specified; only raw event/trace ingestion exists.
